title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-powered mouse pointer that goes beyond the traditional 50+ year-old interface to understand both what users are pointing at and why it matters. The tool enhances workflows across websites, documents, and applications with AI-powered capabilities.
